description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.name: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform: Enterprise CPO Operations Director validated discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for Enterprise CPO Operations Director.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across Web Portal, Public APIs.

linkedInitiatives.description: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform initiative focused on improving charge point connectivity & protocol gateway, charge point management, strengthening customer value for Enterprise CPO Operations Director, and evolving delivery across Web Portal, Public APIs.

assignments.how: Led the discovery framing, synthesis, and recommendation that shaped how Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform moved forward for Enterprise CPO Operations Director.
Supported the discovery with validation on charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management, helping close the main delivery risks.

assignments.teamName: CPO Network Operations - Charge Point Connectivity
assignments.how: Supported the discovery with validation on charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management, helping close the main delivery risks.
Supported the discovery with validation on charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management, helping close the main delivery risks.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Enterprise CPO Operations Director will choose Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform because charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether Enterprise CPO Operations Director describes charge point connectivity & protocol gateway as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform if charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform case.
Which KPI movement did make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Enterprise CPO Operations Director can understand and complete the core Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management.
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management.
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the Enterprise CPO Operations Director segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and charge point management.
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across Web Portal, Public APIs.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform opportunity.

outcome.summary: Discovery confirmed enough signal to proceed into scoped delivery with clearer risk boundaries.
